description: The world's largest amateur radio competition, held annually in October (SSB) and November (CW). Exchange is RST + CQ Zone.

multipliers.description: Each DXCC entity and each CQ Zone worked on each band counts as a separate multiplier

rulesConfig.notes: CQ WW SSB is held the last full weekend of October; CQ WW CW is held the last full weekend of November. Operate a maximum of 48 hours.
